title: ferray-polynomial: genericize Poly trait over coefficient type T: Float
description: Follow-up from #475. The Poly trait is hardwired to f64 (eval(x: f64) -> f64, coeffs() -> &[f64], etc.). Each basis (Power, Chebyshev, Hermite, HermiteE, Legendre, Laguerre) currently has an f64 implementation; PolynomialF32 ships as a near-duplicate mirror in power_f32.rs. The right long-term answer is to make Poly<T: Float> generic so a single set of impls handles f32, f64, and (with bound relaxation) complex. This is the alternative to landing five more sibling types from #725-#729; pick one path or the other.
